Category.title: Category
Category.description: A financial category for income or expenses.

Record.title: Record
Record.description: Monthly financial record containing values for different categories.

/users/{userId}/categories/{categoryId}.description: Stores user-defined categories for income and expense.

/users/{userId}/records/{month}.description: Stores monthly financial records of category values.

/users/{userId}/settings/general.description: A single document storing user settings like base balance.
